reasoning_content: The CreateGEP function needs a type as the first argument in LLVM 17. Let me fix this:

action.command: sed -i 's/auto\* ptr = irb.CreateGEP(lhs, rhs);/auto* ptr = irb.CreateGEP(mIntTy, lhs, rhs);/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "sed -i 's/auto\\* ptr = irb.CreateGEP(lhs, rhs);/auto* ptr = irb.CreateGEP(mIntTy, lhs, rhs);/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp", "summary": "Fix CreateGEP for LLVM 17"}
